questions.question: Explain the difference between component-wise and inter-channel color transformations with examples.
expectedPoints: Component-wise applies same function to each channel independently (e.g., gamma correction to R, G, B separately)
Inter-channel uses relationships between channels (e.g., color balancing matrix multiplication)

questions.question: Describe the process of color transfer between images, including the necessary steps and potential challenges.
expectedPoints: Convert both images to decorrelated color space (e.g., Lab)
Calculate mean and standard deviation for each channel
Apply statistical transformation: target' = (target - mean_target) × (std_source/std_target) + mean_source
Convert back to original color space
Potential loss of natural color relationships
